text.title: Instagram Placements and Creative Specs
text.summary: Placement positions, format specifications, and safe-zone rules for all Instagram ad surfaces.

rule.statement: Target only the placements that match your creative assets — do not enable a placement without providing a correctly sized creative for it.
rule.rationale: Meta auto-crops mismatched creative, which cuts off text and product shots, degrading performance and causing policy rejections.

rule.statement: Use 1080x1350px (4:5) for Feed image ads to maximise vertical screen real estate.
rule.rationale: 4:5 occupies ~22% more screen area than 1:1, increasing visual stop-power in the feed.

rule.statement: For Stories, keep video duration under 15 seconds; for Reels, target 15-30 seconds with the first 1-2 seconds as a hard hook.
rule.rationale: Stories ads auto-advance after 15s; Reels skipped in the first 2s are never seen. Attention must be captured before the viewer scrolls.

list.item: Min resolution: 720p; codec: H.264; audio: AAC stereo

rule.statement: Keep all key content within the Stories safe zone (1080x1420px, centered); avoid the top 250px and bottom 250px.
rule.rationale: Top 250px is reserved for the profile header overlay; bottom 250px is reserved for the CTA button — content placed there is permanently obscured.

list.item: Video: 1:1 ratio only, max 4GB per card, 1s-240min
